sections.paragraph:
Original: גּמר

Transliteration: gômer

Phonetic: go'-mer

BDB Definition:

Gomer = "complete"
  1. the eldest son of Japheth and grandson of Noah; the progenitor of the early Cimmerians and other branches of the Celtic family (noun proper masculine)
  2. the unfaithful wife of the prophet Hosea; Hosea's relationship with her was symbolic of God's relationship with wayward Israel (noun proper feminine)

Origin: from H1584

TWOT entry: 363a

Part(s) of speech:
